chapter_title.ar: باب وَضْعِ الْجَبْهَةِ عَلَى الْأَرْضِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 28 – Placing of the forehead upon the ground

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/153)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/153)
text: سُئِلَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَمَّنْ بِجَبْهَتِهِ عِلَّةٌ لَا يَقْدِرُ عَلَى السُّجُودِ عَلَيْهَا قَالَ يَضَعُ ذَقَنَهُ عَلَى الْأَرْضِ إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ يَقُولُ يَخِرُّونَ لِلْأَذْقانِ سُجَّداً .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad, by a chain of his, said,

‘Abu Abdullahasws was asked about the one who has an illness in his forehead, not being able upon performing Sajdah upon it. Heasws said: ‘He should place his chin upon the ground. Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic is Saying [17:107] they are falling down upon their chins in Sajdah’.
en.sarwar: 6. Ahmad ibn Muhammad from through the chain of his narrators has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, was asked about the case of one on whose forehead there is something because of which he is not able to perform Sajdah (prostration) on it. He (the Imam) said, ‘He places his chin on the ground; Allah, most Majestic, most Glorious, has said, “They fall down on their chins prostrating.’”” [17:107]
